project: VERA: Verified Erasure under Reweighting Ambiguity
primary_claim: VERA lower-certifies the maximum common bounded-reweighting shift radius under which one representation edit simultaneously preserves paired target utility and limits every preregistered leakage attacker; it abstains under unsupported deployment environments.
novelty_boundary: Finite-family testing and abstention follow Learn Then Test style risk control. DKW, Clopper-Pearson, CVaR, and bounded-density-ratio DRO are standard building blocks. The proposed object is the paired multi-contract erasure shift radius, specialized to representation interventions and paired with a support-mismatch impossibility boundary.

exact_synthetic_study.multiplicity: Bonferroni over all candidates, target contracts, and attackers; paired-harm positive and negative binomial bounds split each target-contract alpha equally.
exact_synthetic_study.prediction: Exact multinomial/binomial acceptance probability under the registered synthetic law.
exact_synthetic_study.pass_condition: The simultaneous 95% Clopper-Pearson upper bound on false acceptance is at most delta in every cell and observed abstention lies in the simultaneous 95% exact binomial prediction band in every cell.

real_study.split_policy: Group-stratify official train into 80% eraser-train and 20% construction before caps; use untouched official validation for certification; lock official external/test until all selections are complete.
real_study.preprocessing: Standardize from eraser-train only and fit randomized PCA from eraser-train only.

contracts.target: Maximum environment-conditional mean paired increase in zero-one target loss versus the identity edit.
contracts.leakage: For every attacker, environment, and represented source class, mean source-prediction correctness is at most lambda.
contracts.multiplicity: Bonferroni over every candidate and every target/leakage contract before candidate selection.
contracts.confidence: Exact one-sided Clopper-Pearson for Bernoulli leakage; simultaneous positive-upper and negative-lower Clopper-Pearson bounds for paired {-1,0,1} harm.
contracts.shift_model: Within each observed environment, deployment density ratio relative to certification is bounded by Gamma; environment mixture weights may change arbitrarily.
contracts.support_rule: Any declared external environment absent from certification forces VERA and IID certification to abstain.

real_study.selection_utility: Among eligible candidates, minimize maximum validation leakage, then maximum paired target harm, then candidate key.
real_study.external_evaluation: Use the same environment-conditional target and attacker contracts on the locked external split. A support-mismatch deployment is not certifiable and counts as unsafe if a naive rule deploys.

statistical_tests.mcnemar: exact two-sided McNemar for point selection versus VERA within each dataset, Holm corrected over five datasets
statistical_tests.dependence_caution: Threshold and fraction configurations share seeds; seed-blocked sensitivity analysis must accompany configuration-level McNemar values.
statistical_tests.intervals: 95% Clopper-Pearson intervals for false acceptance and certification retention

pass_conditions.naive_failure: Point selection false acceptance is at least 20% in at least one registered regime for every dataset.
pass_conditions.vera_control: Global VERA false-acceptance 95% upper bound is at most delta.
pass_conditions.paired_significance: Holm-corrected exact McNemar p <= 0.05 on at least four datasets.
pass_conditions.abstract_gap: Point-selection minus VERA false acceptance is at least 15 percentage points.
pass_conditions.receipt_matrix: Every one of 5 datasets x 5 methods x 5 seeds has a valid official-code receipt and no proxy row.
